---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Exhibition · 2026"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    toc: false
    css: assets/2026/gallery.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="preconnect" href="https://www.youtube.com">
    include-after-body:
      text: |
        <script src="assets/2026/gallery.js" defer></script>
---

```{=html}
<div class="ex2026" data-mode="public">

  <section class="ex2026__hero">
    <div class="ex2026__kicker">CCGL9065 · Our Response to Climate Change</div>
    <h1 class="ex2026__title">The 2026 <em>Exhibition</em></h1>
    <p class="ex2026__lede">
      Thirty-eight portfolios. A semester's worth of arguments — about food,
      fashion, fossil fuels, oceans, refugees, and what it means to act.
    </p>
    <div class="ex2026__stats">
      <div class="ex2026__stat"><strong>38</strong>Portfolios</div>
      <div class="ex2026__stat"><strong>36</strong>Collages</div>
      <div class="ex2026__stat"><strong>35</strong>Video Essays</div>
      <div class="ex2026__stat"><strong>36</strong>Reflections</div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ex2026__stage">
    <header class="ex2026__stage-head">
      <div class="ex2026__stage-label">On view · randomized</div>
      <div class="ex2026__stage-counter" data-counter>— / —</div>
    </header>

    <div data-stage>
      <div class="ex2026__loading">Loading exhibition…</div>
    </div>

    <div class="ex2026__controls">
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--ghost" data-prev type="button">← Previous</button>
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--primary" data-next type="button">Next portfolio →</button>
      <button class="ex2026__btn ex2026__btn--ghost" data-shuffle type="button">↻ Shuffle</button>
    </div>

    <div class="ex2026__hint" style="text-align:center;margin-top:1rem">
      Use <kbd>←</kbd> <kbd>→</kbd> or <kbd>Space</kbd> to navigate · <kbd>S</kbd> to shuffle
    </div>
  </section>

  <section class="ex2026__mosaic-section">
    <div class="ex2026__mosaic-head">
      <h2>Index of works</h2>
      <p><em>Click any tile to jump to that portfolio.</em></p>
    </div>
    <div class="ex2026__mosaic" data-mosaic></div>
  </section>

  <footer class="ex2026__footer">
    <a class="ex2026__footer-link" href="exhibition_lookup.html">
      Exhibition presentation · Author lookup →
    </a>
    <div class="ex2026__footer-meta">
      Tool expires end of day · 29 April 2026
    </div>
  </footer>

</div>
```
